name: LinkMind Intelligent Context Compression Engine
description: Compresses OpenClaw session context with the LinkMind API and registers a custom context engine slot.

apiUrl.description: Base URL of the LinkMind service.

apiKey.description: Optional bearer token used to authenticate with the LinkMind service.

compressionThreshold.description: Trigger compaction when accumulated context characters exceed this threshold.

debug.description: Enable verbose plugin logs in the OpenClaw gateway.
